---
title: "iOS Client"
description-meta: "Install and use the openme iOS app on iPhone and iPad — download, profile setup, and sending knocks."
keywords: [openme iOS, openme iPhone, openme iPad, SPA iOS app, knock iOS]
---

The openme iOS app lets you send knock packets from your iPhone or iPad.
Add server profiles, knock with a tap, and open your homescreen widget for
instant one-tap access.

---

## Download {#download}

[Download for iOS →](../download/ios.qmd)

<!-- Screenshot placeholder: App Store listing -->
![openme on the App Store](../images/placeholder-ios-appstore.png){.placeholder}

---

## Add a Profile {#profile}

1. Open **openme** on your device.
2. Tap **+** in the top-right corner.
3. Enter the profile details, or tap **Scan QR** and scan the QR code
   generated by `openme add --qr <name>` on the server.

<!-- Screenshot placeholder: Add profile screen -->
![Add profile screen](../images/placeholder-ios-add-profile.png){.placeholder}

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Name | Friendly label for this server (e.g. "Home Server") |
| Server | Hostname or IP of the server |
| Port | UDP knock port (default: `54154`) |
| Server public key | Curve25519 public key — from `openme add` output |
| Your private key | Ed25519 private key — generated by `openme add` |

---

## Send a Knock {#knock}

1. Select the profile in the profile list.
2. Tap **Knock**.
3. A brief confirmation confirms the packet was sent.

<!-- Screenshot placeholder: Knock button -->
![Profile detail and Knock button](../images/placeholder-ios-knock.png){.placeholder}

::: {.callout-note}
The app sends a UDP packet and does not wait for a response — the server never
replies. A "sent" confirmation means the packet left the device; it does not
confirm the knock was accepted.
:::

---

## Home Screen Widget {#widget}

The openme widget lets you knock without opening the app.

1. Long-press the home screen and tap **+**.
2. Search for **openme**.
3. Choose a widget size and select the profile to bind to it.
4. Tap the widget to knock instantly.

<!-- Screenshot placeholder: Widget on home screen -->
![openme home screen widget](../images/placeholder-ios-widget.png){.placeholder}
